overview:
## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type `SecTrustRef`. The trust reference returned by the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecPKCS12Import(_:_:_:)] function has been evaluated against the basic X.509 policy and includes as complete a certificate chain as could be constructed from the certificates in the PKCS #12 blob, certificates on the keychain, and any other certificates available to the system. You can use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustEvaluate(_:_:)] function if you want to know whether the certificate chain is complete and valid (according to the basic X.509 policy). There is no guarantee that the evaluation will succeed.

# kSecImportItemTrust

**Global Variable**

Trust management object.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecImportItemTrust: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type `SecTrustRef`. The trust reference returned by the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecPKCS12Import(_:_:_:)] function has been evaluated against the basic X.509 policy and includes as complete a certificate chain as could be constructed from the certificates in the PKCS #12 blob, certificates on the keychain, and any other certificates available to the system. You can use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustEvaluate(_:_:)] function if you want to know whether the certificate chain is complete and valid (according to the basic X.509 policy). There is no guarantee that the evaluation will succeed.
title: kSecImportItemTrust
